name: Apollo 16
left: Descent stage · ALSEP · LRV rover · flag · Duke family photo
fact: The only mission to land in the lunar highlands. Charles Duke left a photo of his family sealed in a bag on the lunar surface. On the back he wrote: 'This is the family of Astronaut Duke from Planet Earth. Landed on the Moon, April 1972.' It will outlast civilisation.
capability: Highland geological sampling — diversified the lunar sample inventory beyond mare basalts and reshaped models of planetary crust formation, methods reused for Mars.
